title: Retail Ambassador (Spa/Fitness)
description:
More than a Retail Ambassador, I share the philosophy of total wellness and make a difference to the people around me.

As our Retail Ambassador, you have an influence over our members by actively building a relationship with them and helping them to meet their fitness needs. We are seeking driven, customer-oriented, and eloquent individuals who are willing to go to the extra mile for our members while challenging yourself to achieve personal targets. Join us and be part of a dynamic and upbeat team that will value add your learning and growth as a Retail Ambassador!

Your contributions to our joint success:

  • Work with the team to achieve the branch target
  • Attend to walk-in customers and all telephone enquiries
  • Promote and follow up on renewal of memberships
  • Build and maintain a rapport with all-existing members and potential members
  • Update members on promotional activities from time to time
  • Assist in maintaining proper attendance records for all classes or treatments

What does it take to be a Retail Ambassador:

  • Candidates without work experience are welcome
  • Interested in Fitness and/or Spa
  • Sales and service oriented
  • Self-motivated and a team player
  • Good interpersonal skills
  • Willing to work retail hours (5 working days per week)

Perks you can look forward to:

  • Free usage of gym facilities and fitness classes
  • Staff discount for spa services, spa products
  • Birthday vouchers
  • Medical & Dental benefits provided
  • Career advancement opportunities
  • Training will be provided

We offer a competitive salary and benefits package based on merit and professional advantages of a dynamic environment that supports your development and recognises your achievements.

Interested candidates are welcome to submit a detailed resume. For more information, please visit us at: www.amorefitness.com


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Women Through Every Stage of Life

Since 1985, Amore Fitness has been Singapore’s leading women-only fitness and wellness brand — dedicated to helping women embrace healthier, stronger, and more confident lives.

From students and young professionals to mothers and seniors, we create a supportive community where women can thrive through every chapter of life.

Amore Fitness – Full-service gyms & studios with a wide range of group classes, from dance-inspired workouts to strength training, designed exclusively for women.
am Pilates – Dedicated reformer Pilates studios that focus on posture, core strength, and mindful movement.
Amore Define – Boutique spas offering rejuvenating treatments that restore balance and wellness.

With over four decades of experience, we remain passionate about blending fitness, wellness, and lifestyle into one holistic journey. Our mission goes beyond workouts — we aim to build a strong community of women who uplift and inspire one another.

👉 Join us as we redefine women’s wellness in Singapore.
Reach out to us at hr@amorefitness.com if you are keen to find out about our current openings!
postedCompany.name: AMORE FITNESS PTE. LTD.
